items.api: Added the frontend types and API layer connected to the `/api/sattie/*` backend.
items.routes: Reorganized the routes into Dashboard, Satellites, Orbit Track, Performance, Uplink, Commands, and Scenarios.

runtime.title: Runtime Snapshot

runtime.operatorRestricted: Operator mode: the Satellites menu and management actions are disabled.

dashboard.title: K-Sattie Image Hub
dashboard.description: Simulates archiving satellite-received imagery to disk and generating download links plus quick-view thumbnails. The screen consolidates system status, key API quick checks, command KPIs, and completed links in one place.
